chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1419 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.7128/2025 2. For hearing of main case 18.04.2025 Mr. Shams Mohiuddin Ansari, advocate for the petitioner Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General Mr. Shamshad Ahmed advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.5, which is taken on record. Per learned counsel identical controversy has already been determined by a Division Bench judgment of this Court vide order dated 06.03.2025 in CP D 4318 of 2024 and connected petitions, copy available at page 63 herein. The petitioner seeks similar treatment. Learned counsel for respondent states under instructions that the petition may be disposed of in mutatis mutandis application of the order referred to supra. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
